title: Midnight Crumble Earth Pie
description: A rich and earthy dessert featuring a crumbly crust and midnight sky-inspired flavors.

ingredients.name: Midnight Berries
ingredients.notes: A mix of dark berries such as blackberries and elderberries

ingredients.name: Earthly Oats
ingredients.notes: Rolled oats infused with earthen minerals

ingredients.name: Crumbles
ingredients.notes: A crunchy mixture of seeds and nuts

ingredients.name: Sugar of the Ancients
ingredients.notes: A natural sweetener derived from ancient plant extracts

ingredients.name: Midnight Oil
ingredients.notes: A fragrant oil extracted from the midnight sky

ingredients.name: Vanilla of the Forest
ingredients.notes: A fragrant vanilla extract from the heart of the forest

instructions: Mix together Midnight Berries, Earthly Oats, and Crumbles in a bowl.
In a separate bowl, whisk together Sugar of the Ancients and Midnight Oil.
Add Vanilla of the Forest to the wet ingredients and mix well.
Combine the wet ingredients with the dry ingredients and mix until a crumbly dough forms.
Press the dough into a pie dish and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Bake the pie crust for 20 minutes, or until lightly golden.
Fill the pie crust with the Midnight Berry mixture and bake for an additional 25 minutes, or until the filling is bubbly and the crust is golden brown.
